methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran-Syria theater dominates as US-Iran aerial clashes and Israeli strikes drive acute cross-border escalation risk.
bullets: Iranian gendarmes fired on US rescue helicopters searching for a downed American fighter crew, prompting Israel to delay further strikes as the search for the missing pilot continues.
Israeli tank fire and shelling in southern Syria killed two civilians, while gunmen assassinated a Syrian Defense Ministry commander in Deir ez-Zor.
The World Health Organization warned that attacks on Iranian health facilities pose a regional threat, as Trump declined to comment on potential retaliation for the missing aircrew.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Israeli strike timelines and US-Iran diplomatic channels as the missing pilot search intensifies cross-border military posturing.
